notes.body: SCAM ALERT: Scammers calling stores as "Uber" with connectivity issues asking for email+login. NO ONE gives login info over the phone. Post this by the phone.
Short temp — 7/16 time-and-temp report flagged. Fix the missed 5PM temp + closing checklist.
Celebrations: New Albany +73% WTD, Lafayette +39% WTD. So many up double digits — keep growing.
Payroll Error — Thank you so much (Bobby caught new hire entered at $2,065/hr, corrected inside first hour). Manager certs: Rusul 100, Anthony 99, Madelynn 98 — all passed.
Upload 2065 deposit receipts for 7/10 and 7/14 to the portal.
